description_long: This chest of drawers is crafted from richly grained wood, featuring a rectangular form with three prominent front panels adorned with intricate inlaid patterns. The front face displays elaborate floral and avian motifs, likely hand-carved or etched, giving it a highly decorative and antique appearance. The top surface is bordered with geometric inlays, adding to its ornate character. Both side panels are decorated with similar motifs and are equipped with dark metal ring handles, suggesting ease of movement. The hinges and hardware are subtly integrated, maintaining the visual focus on the decorative artistry. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, highlighting the natural wood tones and detailed craftsmanship.
description: An ornate wooden chest of drawers with intricate carved and inlaid patterns, featuring decorative motifs and metal ring handles on the sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows three rectangular panels with geometric inlays and a smooth, polished wood finish.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a single panel with floral and avian motifs and a dark metal ring handle.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two large panels covered in elaborate floral and bird carvings, with visible hinges.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with ornate motifs and a matching metal ring handle.
